security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'none'; form-action 'none'
security.devCsp: default-src 'self'; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://127.0.0.1:1420 ws://127.0.0.1:1420; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'none'; form-action 'none'
